user.title: BFE Rückliefertarif — choose utility
user.description:
## 2026 Swiss feed-in remuneration overview

| Utility | Base price | HKN remuneration (opt-in) | Remuneration cap | Billing |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| EKZ | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | **Yes** | Quarterly |
| BKW | Reference market price | up to 2.00 Rp/kWh (naturemade star) | No | Quarterly |
| CKW | Reference market price | up to 3.00 Rp/kWh | No | Quarterly |
| Groupe E | Reference market price | up to 4.00 Rp/kWh | **Yes** | Quarterly |
| Primeo Energie | Reference market price | up to 2.00 Rp/kWh | **Yes** | Quarterly |
| Romande Energie | Reference market price | 1.50 Rp/kWh | No | Quarterly |
| SAK | Reference market price | up to 1.50 Rp/kWh | No | Quarterly |
| SGSW | Reference market price | up to 4.60 Rp/kWh | No | Quarterly |
| ewz | Fixed 7.91 Rp/kWh | up to 5.00 Rp/kWh (additive) | No | Quarterly |
| IWB | Fixed 12.95 Rp/kWh | included in base | No | Quarterly |
| SIG | Fixed 8.16 Rp/kWh | up to 2.80 Rp/kWh (additive) | No | Quarterly |
| AEW | Fixed 8.20 Rp/kWh | included in base | No | Quarterly |
| Other / Custom | — | — | configurable | — |

**Remuneration cap** = whether the utility caps the total remuneration (base + HKN) at the legal limit (StromVV Art. 4). Only EKZ, Groupe E, and Primeo apply this cap; everyone else pays base + HKN additively.

Your selection pre-fills the next step — every value remains editable.

---

**Sources:** [SFOE feed-in remuneration page]({agency_url}) · [opendata.swiss reference market price dataset]({opendata_url})

tariff.title: Tariff configuration ({utility_name})
tariff.description: Every value below is pre-filled from the utility you picked. Adjust as needed; the details next to each field explain what it does.

data_description.anlagenkategorie:
## Size + self-consumption
determines the legal **minimum remuneration** (EnV Art. 12) and **remuneration cap** (StromVV Art. 4), applied automatically.

| Size | Mode | Min (Rp/kWh) | Cap (Rp/kWh) |
|---|---|---|---|
| ≤30 kW | with self-consumption | **6.00** | **10.96** |
| ≤30 kW | feed-in only | **6.00** | **8.20** |
| 30–<100 kW | with self-consumption | **180÷kW** | **10.96** |
| 30–<100 kW | feed-in only | **6.20** | **8.20** |
| 100–<150 kW | with self-consumption | **180÷kW** | **7.20** |
| 100–<150 kW | feed-in only | **6.20** | **5.40** |
| ≥150 kW | with self-consumption | no min | **7.20** |
| ≥150 kW | feed-in only | no min | **5.40** |
data_description.installierte_leistung_kw:
## Degressive formula
**Only required** for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption — the minimum remuneration follows the formula `180 ÷ kW`.

Leave at `0` for all other categories.
data_description.basisverguetung:
## Pricing model
- **Reference market price** → most utilities: EKZ, BKW, CKW, Groupe E, Primeo, Romande Energie, SAK, SGSW.
- **Fixed price** → ewz, IWB, SIG, AEW.

The reference market price is published quarterly by the [Swiss Federal Office of Energy (SFOE)]({agency_url}). Source data: [opendata.swiss]({opendata_url}).
data_description.fixpreis_rp_kwh:
## 2026 examples
Only used when **Base price = Fixed price**.

| Utility | Fixed price (Rp/kWh) | HKN |
|---|---|---|
| ewz | **7.91** | + 5.00 (additive) |
| IWB | **12.95** | included |
| SIG | **8.16** | + 2.80 (additive) |
| AEW | **8.20** | included |
data_description.hkn_verguetung_rp_kwh:
## HKN opt-in
Remuneration for **HKN** (*Herkunftsnachweise*, Swiss guarantees of origin).

**Opt-in at most utilities** — set to `0.0` unless you sell HKN to your utility. EKZ pays up to **3.00 Rp/kWh** after enrolling on *myEKZ*.
data_description.verguetungs_obergrenze:
## Cap behavior
**On**: total remuneration capped at limit, derived from *Plant category* above. When base + HKN would exceed the cap, HKN is reduced to fit.

- **On** → EKZ, Groupe E, Primeo
- **Off** → every other Swiss utility (~98%): BKW, CKW, SAK, SGSW, ewz, IWB, SIG, AEW, Romande Energie, …
data_description.abrechnungs_rhythmus:
## Invoice cycle
Match your utility's invoice cycle. **Most Swiss utilities settle quarterly.**

entities.title: Home Assistant entity wiring
entities.description: Link the kWh counter for your grid export and the CHF sensor that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates.

data_description.stromnetzeinspeisung_kwh:
## kWh counter
The **kWh counter** that tracks energy fed into the grid.

Must already be wired into the **Energy Dashboard** under *'Return to grid'*.
data_description.rueckliefervergutung_chf:
## Auto-created CHF sensor
The **CHF sensor** that the Energy Dashboard auto-creates when you configure *'Return to grid with a price'*.

HA names it with a `_compensation` suffix (usually `sensor.YOUR_GRID_EXPORT_compensation`). This integration writes into its **Long-Term Statistics**.
data_description.namenspraefix:
## Naming prefix
Prefix for this integration's **diagnostic sensors** and **action buttons** (e.g. `sensor.PREFIX_basisverguetung`, `button.PREFIX_recompute_aktuelles_quartal`).

*Only change* if the default collides.

error.kw_required_for_degressive: Installed power (kW) is required for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption — federal law uses the formula 180 ÷ kW to set the minimum remuneration.
error.fixpreis_required: Fixed price must be greater than 0 when the base price is set to 'Fixed price'.

init.title: BFE Rückliefertarif options
init.description: What would you like to do?

tariff.title: Adjust tariff settings
tariff.description: Edit your tariff configuration. Changes apply to every future re-import.

reimport_quarter.title: Re-import a specific quarter
reimport_quarter.description: Recompute the feed-in remuneration in CHF/h for a specific past quarter. Use this after fixing tariff settings to update an already-published quarter (e.g. correct a wrong HKN setting that was used for `2026Q1`).

data_description.quarter:
## Quarter identifier
**Format:** `YYYYQN` (e.g. `2026Q1`, `2025Q4`).

The quarter must already be published by SFOE — typically about **2 weeks after quarter end**.

entities.title: Re-wire Home Assistant entities
entities.description: Change which Home Assistant entities this integration writes to. Use only if your sensor names changed.

data_description.stromnetzeinspeisung_kwh:
## kWh counter
kWh counter wired into the **Energy Dashboard** under *'Return to grid'*.
data_description.rueckliefervergutung_chf:
## Auto-created CHF sensor
Auto-created CHF sensor (HA suffix `_compensation`, usually `sensor.YOUR_GRID_EXPORT_compensation`).
data_description.namenspraefix:
## Naming prefix
Prefix used to name this integration's diagnostic sensors and buttons.

error.kw_required_for_degressive: Installed power (kW) is required for 30–<150 kW plants with self-consumption.
error.fixpreis_required: Fixed price must be greater than 0 when the base price is set to 'Fixed price'.
error.price_not_yet_published: SFOE has not yet published this quarter. Try again about 2 weeks after quarter end.
error.reimport_failed: Re-import failed unexpectedly. Check Settings → System → Logs.
